title: vitex pubescens
intro: Vitex pubescens, also known as the Chinese chaste tree or white chaste tree, is a plant species in the Verbenaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitex pubescens include its ability to regulate the menstrual cycle, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. Vitex pubescens can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
